overview.short: Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Tuticorin, is a minor basilica located at Tuticorin.
overview.description: Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Tuticorin, is a minor basilica located at Tuticorin. It is one of the Catholic pilgrimage centers in India dedicated to the Our Lady of Snows, a title given to Mother Mary. Even to this day, the Coastal People fondly call her Santa Maria Das Nevis(Senhora, Das Nevis), which means Our Lady of Snows in Portuguese. The shrine name refers to the Basilica di Santa Maria Maggiore in Rome.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Tuticorin
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Tuticorin (Latin: Tuticoren(sis)) is a unit (or 'particular Church') of the Catholic Church in the city of Tuticorin, part of the ecclesiastical province of Madurai in India.

topPlaces.name: Thoothukudi - Nazareth Diocese of the Church of South India
topPlaces.description: The Thoothukudi - Nazareth Diocese is a diocese of Church of South India in Tamil Nadu state of India.The diocese is one among the 22 dioceses of Church of South India, a United Protestant denomination.The cathedral of the diocese is St. John's Cathedral at Nazareth, Tamil Nadu.

image.alt: Thoothukudi - Nazareth Diocese of the Church of South India

topPlaces.name: Thoothukudi
topPlaces.description: Thoothukudi (formerly called Tuticorin) is a port industrial city in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the Coromandel Coast of the Bay of Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Tuticorin Thermal Power Station
topPlaces.description: Thoothukudi Thermal Power Station (Tamil: தூத்துக்குடி அனல் மின் நிலையம்) is a power plant situated near newport of Thoothukudi in Tamil Nadu, India, on the sea shore of Bay of Bengal. It has 5 units with a total installed capacity of 1,050 MW and spread over 160 hectares (400 acres).

topPlaces.name: Mappilaiurani
topPlaces.description: Mappilaiurani is a village in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Muttayyapuram
topPlaces.description: Muthaiahpuram is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: NTPL Thermal Power Station
topPlaces.description: NTPL Thermal Power Station is a 1000 MW (2×500 MW) coal-based thermal plant in the Tuticorin District of Tamil Nadu. The project is a joint venture of TNPGCL and NLC India Limited.

topPlaces.name: Pandarampatti
topPlaces.description: Pandarampatti is a village in Thoothukudi District of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a population of around 2000.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Thoothukudi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Thoothukudi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Thoothukudi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (115 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (124 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Thoothukudi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Thoothukudi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Thoothukudi?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Thoothukudi start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of Our Lady of Snows, Thoothukudi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diocese of Tuticorin, Thoothukudi - Nazareth Diocese of the Church of South India, Thoothukudi, Tuticorin Thermal Power Station, Mappilaiurani.
